problem.title: Longest Valid Parentheses
problem.description: Given a string containing just the characters '(' and ')', find the length of the longest valid (well-formed) parentheses substring.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Stack
solutions.description: Use a stack initialized with a sentinel value of -1 to represent the base index. For each '(' push its index; for each ')' pop the top and compute the valid length as the distance from the current index to the new top of the stack. If the stack is empty after popping, push the current index as a new base/sentinel. This approach handles nested and consecutive valid substrings in a single O(n) pass.
